title: dasiphora parvifolia
intro: Dasiphora parvifolia, also known as the Eurasian burnet or silver bufaloba, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce fever. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Dasiphora parvifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems.
